platform_billing_page.title: Billing & usage
platform_billing_page.subtitle: Company balances, effective prices, settlement rules, and usage records.
platform_billing_page.companies_overview_hint: Balance, monthly cap, current spend, and administrator actions.
platform_billing_page.billing_company_required: Select a company in the panel above.
platform_billing_page.hint_prices_global_scope: Global override applies before company override.
platform_billing_page.hint_company_prices_scope: Company override takes precedence over the global catalog.
platform_billing_page.hint_settlement_company_scope: Company rules decide which spans become usage records.
platform_billing_page.forbidden: This section is only available when the active company is system
platform_billing_page.price_effective_global_hint: Catalog after applying the global override.
platform_billing_page.price_effective_company_hint: Selected company catalog after merging base, global override, and company override.
platform_billing_page.price_effective_company_layers_hint: Final unit price is base from config/global/company override × tariff-plan multiplier; settlement rules define quantity.
platform_billing_page.price_override_empty: Override is empty: lower-priority values are used.
platform_billing_page.price_invalid_row: Check price rows: category, resource, and price are required
platform_billing_page.confirm_replace_rules_default: Replace the current rules JSON with the platform default?
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_doc_version: Rules JSON document version. The backend currently supports version=1; change it only when migrating the rules format.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_application_mode: How to apply rules after matching and exclusive groups. first_win charges only the first rule with the lowest priority. all_matching charges all matched rules, but keeps only the lowest-priority rule inside each exclusive group.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_enabled: A disabled rule stays in JSON but is completely ignored by backend settlement, so it creates no usage.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_rule_id: Stable rule identifier. It is used for idempotency by span_id + rule_id and is written to usage.metadata.rule_id. Do not rename an active rule casually: a new id is treated as a new charge key.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_priority: Lower number runs earlier. Priority selects the winner inside an exclusive group and defines application order. In first_win mode only the first sorted rule is charged.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_exclusive_group: Optional mutual-exclusion group. If several matched rules share the same exclusive group, the backend keeps only one rule: the one with the lowest priority. Empty means the rule is not grouped.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_resource_name: Resource used to look up unit price: category:resource, for example llm:*, embedding:*, billing:rub, livekit:room_minute. If exact price is missing, category:* is used. tool: is forbidden for settlement rules.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_usage_type: The usage record type created by settlement. Backend accepts only these enum values: tool_call, llm_request, embedding_request, rerank_request, agent_execution, flow_execution, file_upload, storage_usage.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_quantity_mode: Source of usage quantity. Constant creates const:<number>. Attributes field creates attr:<key> and reads quantity from span.attributes.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_quantity_const_value: Integer number of resource units. Backend casts it to int and requires >= 0. Quantity 0 does not create usage; the span is marked skipped:zero_quantity.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_quantity_attr_value: Key in span.attributes used as quantity. The value must exist, cast to int, and be >= 0, otherwise settlement for this rule fails.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_match_operation: Condition on span.operation_name. All configured match conditions are combined with AND. Prefix uses startswith, exact match compares the whole string, regex runs Python re.search on operation_name.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_match_service: Condition on span.service_name. Use exact match for a specific service or regex for a pattern. Ignore means service_name is not used for matching. All rule conditions are combined with AND.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_match_event: Condition on span.event_type. Use it when operation_name is not specific enough. Exact match compares the whole value, regex runs Python re.search. Missing/empty event_type does not match regex/equals.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_attr_equals_section: Every listed pair must exactly match span.attributes: backend compares actual == expected. Value may be a JSON scalar: string, number, true, false, or null.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_attr_regex_section: Every listed attribute must match regex. Backend compiles regex on save and applies Python re.search to str(value).
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_attr_present_section: Every listed key must be present in span.attributes and its value must not be null/None. The actual value is not compared.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_attr_key: Full span.attributes key, for example platform.llm.provider or platform.billing.quantity. The key must match what tracing really writes.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_attr_equals_value: Expected attribute value for exact comparison. For strings you may type openrouter; for numbers/booleans/null use a valid JSON scalar such as 10, true, or null.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_attr_regex_value: Regex pattern for the attribute value. Backend uses Python re.search on the string representation, so use ^...$ only when you need a full match.
platform_billing_page.rule_hint_attr_present_key: Required attributes key for matching. Useful together with quantity attr so the rule cannot match a span without the needed quantity.
platform_billing_page.usage_facet_hint: Filters use exact values; suggestions fill company id, usage type, or resource.
platform_billing_page.system_access_user_context_invalid: Could not detect current system user

platform_billing_page.balance_grant_amount_invalid: Enter an amount from 0.01 to 10,000,000 RUB

select_company.empty_text: Create your first company to get started

team_page.title: Team
team_page.subtitle: Manage company members and their roles
team_page.empty_description: Copy the invite link and send it to a teammate

llm_context_editor.profile_hint: Ready-made behavior preset. Disabled turns the layer off; Window only keeps a short history; Memory + retrieval adds memory/RAG; Agent gives more memory and RAG budget for complex agents.
llm_context_editor.mode_hint: Main context assembly mode. off leaves messages unchanged; window keeps only the active window; smart adds memory/RAG within budgets; agent uses long-term memory more actively.
llm_context_editor.memory_hint: Where previous conversation episodes can come from. off disables memory; session uses this session; node uses this node; flow uses the whole flow; company uses company memory.
llm_context_editor.retrieval_hint: How relevant history and knowledge are searched. semantic searches by meaning; lexical by words; hybrid uses both; off disables retrieval.
llm_context_editor.budget_hint: Preset for context size. The runtime still clamps the real maximum to the selected model context length.
llm_context_editor.top_k_hint: How many memory/RAG candidates to fetch before filtering and rerank. Higher values find more, but cost more and can add noise.
llm_context_editor.min_score_hint: Minimum relevance from 0 to 1. Blocks below this threshold are not added to context.
llm_context_editor.rerank_hint: Second-pass sorting for retrieved blocks. Usually improves memory/RAG selection quality, but adds a little latency.
llm_context_editor.compaction_hint: How old messages and large blocks are compressed. auto compresses when needed; force is aggressive; off disables compaction.
llm_context_editor.cache_hint: Prompt caching hints. provider_hints enables provider-specific cache hints when the provider supports them.
llm_context_editor.max_input_tokens_hint: Hard maximum for input context before the answer. If the selected model supports less, runtime clamps this automatically.
llm_context_editor.active_window_tokens_hint: How many recent messages are kept verbatim. This is the live part of the conversation, not a summary.
llm_context_editor.memory_tokens_hint: Token budget for retrieved memory episodes.
llm_context_editor.rag_tokens_hint: Token budget for RAG documents and knowledge.
llm_context_editor.tool_result_tokens_hint: Token budget reserved for tool results before calling the LLM.
llm_context_editor.output_reserve_tokens_hint: Reserve for the model answer, so input context cannot consume the full limit.
llm_context_editor.reasoning_reserve_tokens_hint: Reserve for models that need extra reasoning budget.
llm_context_editor.safety_buffer_tokens_hint: Technical buffer for service tokens and token counting error.

settings_page.title: Settings
settings_page.subdomain_help: Subdomain cannot be changed after creation
settings_page.oauth_info: Configure sign-in methods for your team
settings_page.sessions_placeholder: Active session list will be available in a future version
settings_page.integrations_info: Integrations connect external services to your platform
settings_page.security_info: Manage active sessions and authentication methods
settings_page.metadata_help: Arbitrary JSON exposed to flows as @company:metadata
settings_page.metadata_invalid: metadata must be a valid JSON object

ai_providers.section_context_help: Company default is applied to every text LLM call unless a node, resource, or inline call overrides context.
ai_providers.section_custom_providers_help: Register your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint (vLLM, Ollama, corporate gateway) and use it in any capability.
ai_providers.custom_modal_help: Register your company's OpenAI-compatible endpoint (vLLM, Ollama, corporate gateway). The key is encrypted and available only to this company. For capabilities with a fixed platform model use model_by_capability for aliases.
ai_providers.custom_modal_id_invalid: ID must be a-z, 0-9, _, - and 1-32 characters
ai_providers.custom_modal_base_url_invalid: Base URL must start with http:// or https://
ai_providers.custom_modal_api_key_keep_edit: Leave empty to keep the current saved key.
ai_providers.custom_modal_rerank_path_required: rerank_path is required for the rerank capability
ai_providers.custom_modal_extra_body_help: Extra JSON body fields for POST /chat/completions (merged last, overrides defaults). Example: {"top_p": 0.9, "safety_settings": {"harassment": "block_none"}}.
ai_providers.custom_modal_json_invalid: Field {{field}} must be a valid JSON object
ai_providers.section_capabilities_help: Pick a provider for each capability (platform or custom). When using BYOK key or a custom provider the billing for that capability is 0 — company balance is not charged.
ai_providers.platform_model_help: Fixed in platform configuration; not editable here.
ai_providers.model_override_help: Leave empty to use the platform model; set a value to make it the company default for this capability.
ai_providers.model_required_help: A model is required for the selected provider. Use Humanitec LLMs / auto for automatic free-model routing.
ai_providers.voice_model_help: Leave empty to use the platform speech model; pick a model to make it the company default for this capability.
ai_providers.embedding_dimension_help: Embedding models are filtered by the current pgvector storage dimension; incompatible dimensions cannot be saved.
ai_providers.humanitec_llms_provider_tooltip: Humanitec LLMs is the platform virtual provider: it routes requests to free models from the shared verified free pool.
ai_providers.humanitec_llms_auto_tooltip: auto selects a free model from request requirements: tools, structured output, files/images, context, and model scoring.
ai_providers.fallback_models_help: Ordered company fallback chain. Each fallback is an explicit provider/model pair from the capability catalog.
ai_providers.api_key_help: Leave empty to keep the current key. Enter a new value to replace it.
ai_providers.cap_llm_chat_help: Default for flows and other chat LLM calls.
ai_providers.cap_llm_summarize_help: NetWorkle daily summaries, attachment summarization, and context memory compaction.
ai_providers.cap_llm_format_markdown_help: Shared plain text to Markdown formatting for platform workflows.
ai_providers.cap_llm_codegen_help: Code generation and custom tools in flows.

search_providers.title: Company Search providers
search_providers.subtitle: These settings are used by Search MCP in flows. Use Humanitec platform keys or attach company BYOK keys per provider.
search_providers.billing_platform: Platform key: every successful external call is billed as search:<provider>.
search_providers.billing_company: Company key: the company pays the provider directly; Humanitec balance is not charged.
search_providers.billing_system: The system company and public homepage do not put search provider calls into settlement.

model_scoring.title: LLM model scoring
model_scoring.help: Global score controls model ordering in the platform free pool.

company_voice_providers_page.title: Company voice providers
company_voice_providers_page.subtitle: Per-company override for STT/TTS/VAD providers. Override is applied on top of deployment-default. Editable by company owner/admin only.
company_voice_providers_page.hint_stt: Audio stream → text. Used by /voice WS, auto-STT for inbound A2A/embed/chat audio, and the transcribe_audio facade.
company_voice_providers_page.hint_tts: Text → audio. Used by /voice WS and the synthesize_speech facade.
company_voice_providers_page.hint_vad: Detects speech segments in audio (used by the voice gateway).
company_voice_providers_page.model_default_litserve: When no model is picked, Humanitec Voice uses the deployment-default model for the selected voice capability.
company_voice_providers_page.err_sample_rate_nan: Sample rate must be a number.
company_voice_providers_page.err_threshold_nan: VAD threshold must be a number.
company_voice_providers_page.placeholder_secret_set: Already stored (enter a new value to replace)
company_voice_providers_page.hint_cloud_ru_credentials: Cloud.ru Foundation Models API key can live here or in deployment; saving from this form makes the company key override deployment for this company.
company_voice_providers_page.hint_yandex_stub: SpeechKit REST runtime is not wired yet: credentials are persisted and will apply after the HTTP client is implemented.
company_voice_providers_page.hint_sber_stub: SaluteSpeech REST runtime is not wired yet: credentials are persisted and will apply after the HTTP client is implemented.
company_voice_providers_page.empty_no_company: Pick a company (not system) to manage voice providers.

pronunciation_rules_page.title: TTS Pronunciation Rules
pronunciation_rules_page.subtitle: Word replacement dictionary before speech synthesis. Rules are applied to all TTS providers: platform → company → per-call.
pronunciation_rules_page.hint_language: ISO 639-1: ru, en, de — empty = any language
pronunciation_rules_page.hint_word_boundary: Match whole words only, not substrings
pronunciation_rules_page.empty: No pronunciation rules. Platform rules (Humanitec → humanitec) are applied automatically.
pronunciation_rules_page.empty_no_company: Select a company to manage pronunciation rules.

api_keys_page.title: API keys
api_keys_page.subtitle: Manage keys for platform integrations
api_keys_page.info_body: The secret is shown only once when the key is created. Store it safely. If lost, create a new key.
api_keys_page.empty_description: Create your first key to integrate with the platform
api_keys_page.confirm_revoke: Revoke key "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

embed_page.title: Embed widgets
embed_page.subtitle: Chat widgets to embed on a website
embed_page.confirm_delete: Delete this widget? This cannot be undone.
embed_page.external_wizard_note: Canonical path: Platform Embed Chat + short-lived embed-session token endpoint.

embed_create_modal.err_flow_stale: This flow is not in the current list — select a flow again
embed_create_modal.err_save_concurrent: A create is already in progress — wait for it to finish
embed_create_modal.flow_hint: List from the flows service for the current company
embed_create_modal.branch_default_hint: Branch: default (external flow or no branches in config).
embed_create_modal.placeholder_greeting_message: Assistant’s first line when the chat opens
embed_create_modal.message_placeholder_hint: Hint shown in the empty message field in the embed chat.
embed_create_modal.err_message_placeholder: Enter a placeholder or restore the default text
embed_create_modal.interface_locale_hint: UI language of the embed chat on external websites
embed_create_modal.allowed_origins_hint: One origin per line. Empty means no origin restriction.
embed_create_modal.guest_max_user_messages_hint: Maximum user messages per conversation (one contextId) for embed-session tokens. Empty means unlimited. Enforced by the flows service.
embed_create_modal.err_guest_max_user_messages: Integer from 1 to 500, or leave empty
embed_create_modal.show_launcher_hint: Turn off if the website opens chat via its own toggle button
embed_create_modal.label_voice_enabled: Enable voice duplex (WebSocket, same as flows)
embed_create_modal.voice_enabled_hint: Composer microphone opens the voice WebSocket session (STT/TTS). Turn off to use browser dictation into the textarea only (when supported). On by default for new widgets.
embed_create_modal.voice_default_on_hint: Automatically start the voice session when the widget opens. Ignored if voice mode is disabled.
embed_create_modal.landing_visible_hint: Only for the system company: card on /demo/digital-workers and guest session issuance.
embed_create_modal.landing_card_image_hint: Required when landing visibility is enabled
embed_create_modal.err_landing_image: Enter an image URL for the card

embed_code_modal.description: Paste this snippet before the closing </body> tag:
embed_code_modal.token_howto_step_2: Inside backend, call the platform endpoint below with issuer token (hum_...).
embed_code_modal.token_howto_step_3: Return token to browser; frontend must call only /api/chat-token.
embed_code_modal.token_endpoint_description: Platform endpoint for server-to-server issuing short-lived embed-session tokens. Call it only from your website backend, never from the browser:
embed_code_modal.client_backend_example_title: Browser call example to your backend
embed_code_modal.allowed_origins_empty: The list is empty — the platform does not enforce an origin allow-list for session-token.
embed_code_modal.allowed_origins_nonempty: For session-token, the origin string must match one of the values below exactly.

scheduler_page.title: Scheduler tasks
scheduler_page.subtitle: Cron, interval and one-time scheduled jobs

topup_modal.err_amount_invalid: Amount must be a positive number
topup_modal.err_amount_min: Minimum top up amount is 100 RUB

support_page.title: Support
support_page.lede: Email us or use the form below: your mail app will open with a message addressed to our support inbox.
support_page.note_mailto: Nothing is sent through our servers: your system mail app (or default client) will open.
support_page.err_reply_email: Enter a valid email or leave the field empty.
support_page.err_too_long: The message is too long for a mailto link — shorten the text.
